rationale: The only existing RUM test is sourcemap-ui.spec.js, which covers Error Tracking UI (RUM errors list, error detail view, stack traces) — a completely different feature from the Sessions Health & Metrics Dashboard. No existing spec covers the sessions dashboard, KPI strip, segment filters, or session replay navigation. A brand-new spec is required. Playwright auto-discovers *.spec.js under testDir, so no explicit config registration is needed.
